case_title: TUCHBAND, STEVEN M. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,390.49 FILED BY TUCHBAND, STEVEN M. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUCHBAND, STEVEN M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
